zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger  IV Deincourt Lord of Knapthorpe於1293年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾時，他的父親John Deincourt28歲，母親Joan de Odingsells26歲。他於1315年與Matilda Bugge在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾李結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1350年在英國諾廷加姆爾享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger  IV Deincourt Lord of Knapthorpe于1293年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾时，他的父亲John Deincourt28岁，母亲Joan de Odingsells26岁。他于1315年与Matilda Bugge在英国英格兰斯塔福爾李结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1350年在英国諾廷加姆爾享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger  IV Deincourt Lord of Knapthorpe was born in 1293, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Deincourt, was 28 and his mother, Joan de Odingsells, was 26. He married Matilda Bugge in 1315, in Leigh, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died about 1350, in Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger  IV Deincourt Lord of Knapthorpe est né en 1293, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Deincourt, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Joan de Odingsells, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Matilda Bugge en 1315, à Leigh, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1350, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger  IV Deincourt Lord of Knapthorpe 1293 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Deincourt 28 und seine Mutter Joan de Odingsells 26. Er hat 1315 in Leigh, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Matilda Bugge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1350 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Nottinghamshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger  IV Deincourt Lord of Knapthorpe è nato il nel 1293 nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Deincourt, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Odingsells, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Matilda Bugge nel 1315, nel Leigh, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì circa 1350, nel Nottinghamshire, England, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger  IV Deincourt Lord of Knapthorpeが1293年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Deincourtは28歳，母Joan de Odingsellsは26歳であった。1315年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアレイグでMatilda Buggeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1350年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger  IV Deincourt Lord of Knapthorpe(이)가 1293년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Deincourt(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Odingsells(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1315년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 리에서 Matilda Bugge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1350년 영국 노틴그함실르에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger  IV Deincourt Lord of Knapthorpe nasceu em 1293, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Deincourt, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Odingsells, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda Bugge em 1315, em Leigh, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1350, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger  IV Deincourt Lord of Knapthorpe родился в 1293 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Deincourt было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Odingsells, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda Bugge в 1315 г. в местности лиг, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер около 1350 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger  IV Deincourt Lord of Knapthorpe nació en 1293, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Deincourt, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Joan de Odingsells, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Matilda Bugge en 1315, en Leigh, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1350, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años.
